name: Herbed Spinach Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 Frozen chopped spinach (10 oz) cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked spinach, rice, cheese, eggs, melted butter, milk, chopped onion, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and rosemary. Mix well.
3. Grease a baking dish with margarine.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
5. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until set.
